exactFindings.remediation: Finding-specific temporary acceptance with expiry and reachability controls in audit/TRIAGE.json.
exactFindings.rootCause: Transitive Hardhat/toolbox build dependencies pin lodash 4.x; no fixed 4.x release is available in npm metadata.
Mocha transitive dependency under Hardhat used vulnerable serialize-javascript.
solc transitive tmp dependency used a vulnerable temporary-file library.
Hardhat and hardhat-verify pulled undici below the fixed 6.27.0 line.

pipelineDefects: fail-on-critical-findings.py accepted missing and malformed evidence as success
audit summary exposed only aggregate critical_high_unresolved count for direct wrapper counts
scanner wrappers used unpinned @latest installs and stale current-run/latest pointers
normalized finding details were not required before gate evaluation
rootCauses: Transitive Hardhat/toolbox build dependencies pin lodash 4.x; no fixed 4.x release is available in npm metadata.
Mocha transitive dependency under Hardhat used vulnerable serialize-javascript.
solc transitive tmp dependency used a vulnerable temporary-file library.
Hardhat and hardhat-verify pulled undici below the fixed 6.27.0 line.
